prompts.label: dehydrated skin causes

prompts.claudeResponse: Dehydrated skin lacks water, not oil—caused by over-exfoliation, harsh products, or insufficient hydration, and fixed with humectants like hyaluronic acid and glycerin (The Ordinary Hyaluronic Acid 2% + B5).
